title: codereview: tdeck keyboard driver polling thread safety and resource use
description: lilygo_tdeck_keyboard.c uses fixed 512 byte stack, priority 5, no error handling on i2c, infinite poll loop without yield on error, hardcoded to INPUT_KEY_ENTER and reg 0x03. Should follow Zephyr input driver best practices (use input dev api fully, perhaps use workqueue instead of dedicated thread). P2 for production. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-nour
close_reason: Fixed keyboard enablement in defconfig, pinctrl, binding, driver best practices after 3 codereview passes
